headline: Micron, Broadcom, Palantir, Delta, SpaceX, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: Stocks fall broadly as the Iran war cease-fire appears to be over. Crude prices rise, pushing many oil stocks higher.

headline: BMO Capital bullish on top pick Royal Caribbean as cruise tailwinds ’favorable’
summary: Investing.com -- BMO Capital Markets has started coverage of Royal Caribbean Cruises with an Outperform rating and a $370 price target, implying approximately 30% total return, calling it the firm's top pick in the cruise sector.
